latestArticles.description: House Freedom Caucus threatened to block the Senate DHS funding deal, demanding full-year ICE and CBP funding plus voter ID requirements in the bill.

latestArticles.title: Assassination Plot Targeting N.Y.C. Palestinian Activist Is Disrupted
latestArticles.description: Law enforcement officials did not identify a suspect or motive, but told Nerdeen Kiswani, a co-founder of the pro-Palestinian group Within Our Lifetime, that she had been targeted, her lawyer said.
